# PRO-TAYLOR
> Factory-direct dessert equipment website focused on structured product pages, buyer guidance, and quote conversion.

## Main sections
- [Homepage](https://www.protaylor.com/): Overview of the brand, canonical categories, trust signals, and inquiry direction.
- [Products](https://www.protaylor.com/products): Canonical category entry for frozen dessert equipment families.
- [Soft Ice Cream Machines](https://www.protaylor.com/products/soft-ice-cream-machine): Category template for comparing commercial soft serve equipment.
- [ICM-T838 Twin Twist Soft Serve Machine](https://www.protaylor.com/products/soft-ice-cream-machine/icm-t838-twin-twist-soft-serve-machine): Product detail template with quick facts, specification groups, FAQ, and quote context.
- [Soft Serve Machine Buying Guide](https://www.protaylor.com/resources/soft-serve-buying-guide): Buyer guide for throughput, cleaning rhythm, and model shortlist logic.
- [Contact](https://www.protaylor.com/contact): Shared inquiry route with project-context form.

## Key facts
- Product quick facts are derived from highlighted specification rows instead of fixed duplicate fields.
- Related products and related resources are modeled separately.
- Homepage and product detail routes are structured for both buyer readability and machine-extractable understanding.
- The mobile homepage is rebuilt responsively from the approved desktop design because the existing mobile Stitch draft is content-invalid.
